sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the changes:
1. The dark gray diamond at (7-11, 47-51) became a WHITE diamond (id=7, color=W) with orange center (id=8, color=O at 9,49). So clicking it activated it!
2. The white diamond with orange center at (14-18, 36-40) became a DARK GRAY diamond (id=16, color=G) with orange center (id=22, color=O at 16,38).
3. The orange diamond with magenta center stayed at (13-17, 29-33).
4. The purple ring is still at (15-21, 54-60).
So the pattern is:
- Clicking a dark gray diamond activates it (turns white)
- The previous white diamond marker becomes a dark gray diamond again
- This is like "moving" the activation along the trail
So the sequence so far:
1. Click purple ring → orange diamond moves, ring becomes white diamond
2. Click orange diamond → it moves, previous position becomes white diamond, ring reappears
3. Click dark gray diamond → it activates (turns white), previous white diamond becomes dark gray
Now I need to figure out what to do next. In level 1, after activating the dark gray diamond, clicking the ring again completed the level. Let me try clicking the purple ring again.
Wait, but there are still more dark gray diamonds to activate. Let me think about the full chain:
- Dark gray diamond at (19-23, 6-10) with orange center - NOT activated
- Orange diamond with magenta center at (13-17, 29-33) - current position
- Dark gray diamond at (14-18, 36-40) with orange center - NOT activated (was white, now dark gray again)
- White diamond at (7-11, 47-51) with orange center - ACTIVATED
The trail seems to go: dark gray (21,8) → orange diamond (15,31) → dark gray (16,38) → white (9,49)
The activation moved from (16,38) to (9,49). Now I need to activate the other dark gray diamonds.
But wait, in level 1, the sequence was:
1. Click ring → purple square moves to ring
2. Click purple square → moves down
3. Click dark gray diamond → activates
4. Click ring again → level complete
For level 2, maybe I need to:
1. Activate all dark gray diamonds on the orange chain
2. Then do something with the purple chain
3. Then click the ring to complete
Let me try clicking the purple ring again to see if it triggers the next step.
